notableEvents.label: Jorge Soler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Soler grounds into a double play, second baseman Justin Foscue to first baseman Jake Burger. Nolan Schanuel out at 2nd. Jorge Soler out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Josh Jung GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Jung grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Joc Pederson out at 2nd. Josh Jung out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Sam Haggerty pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sam Haggerty pops out to first baseman Nolan Schanuel in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Sam Haggerty pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sam Haggerty grounds into a force out, second baseman Oswald Peraza to shortstop Zach Neto. Justin Foscue out at 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Andrew McCutchen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew McCutchen flies out to second baseman Oswald Peraza.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
